CustomField.description: Maximum number of Household member names to list individually before truncating with the Name Overrun string. For example, if set to 2 and there are 4 members, the name might be "Smith & Jones Family" instead of listing all four. Works with the Name Overrun setting.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Max Household members to name individually before using the Name Overrun string (e.g., "and Family").
CustomField.label: Contact Overrun Count
